title: Full Stack Developer
description: Master both frontend and backend technologies
markdownContent:
# Full Stack Developer Roadmap

Become a Full Stack Developer in 2024. This roadmap covers everything from the basics of HTML/CSS to advanced server-side architecture.

## 1. Frontend Fundamentals
- HTML5 & CSS3
- JavaScript (ES6+)
- Responsive Design

```javascript
// Master the basics
const greeting = 'Hello World';
console.log(greeting);
```

## 2. Frontend Frameworks
- **React**: Components, Hooks, State Management
- **Vue/Angular**: Alternative options

## 3. Backend Technologies
- **Node.js**: Server-side JavaScript
- **Databases**: MongoDB (NoSQL), PostgreSQL (SQL)
- **API Design**: RESTful APIs, GraphQL

## 4. DevOps & Deployment
- Docker & Kubernetes
- CI/CD Pipelines
- AWS / Vercel Deployment

title: Frontend Engineer
markdownContent:
# Frontend Engineer Roadmap Focus on crafting beautiful user experiences. ## Core Skills - Advanced CSS (Flexbox, Grid) - DOM Manipulation - Accessibility (a11y) ## Modern Ecosystem - TypeScript - Next.js / Remix - State Management (Redux, Zustand) ```tsx interface Props { title: string; } const Card = ({ title }: Props) =>
{title}
; ```

title: Backend Architect
markdownContent:
# Backend Architect Roadmap

Build the systems that power applications.

## Server Side
- Node.js, Python, or Go
- System Design Patterns
- Microservices Architecture

## Data Management
- Database Design & Normalization
- Caching (Redis)
- Message Queues (RabbitMQ, Kafka)

title: DevOps & Cloud
markdownContent:
# DevOps Roadmap

Bridge the gap between development and operations.

## Infrastructure as Code
- Terraform
- Ansible

## Cloud Providers
- AWS, Azure, Google Cloud
- Serverless Architecture

title: System Design
description: Learn to architect complex distributed systems
markdownContent:
# System Design Roadmap

Master the art of building scalable systems.

## Core Concepts
- Scalability (Horizontal vs Vertical)
- Load Balancing
- Database Sharding
- CAP Theorem

## Design Interviews
- URL Shortener
- Chat Application
- Rate Limiter
